name: open-gamestudio
description: Codex-native CLI workflow layer for game projects.
author: MerlinH

scripts.validate: npm run build --silent && node dist/cli.js validate
scripts.init: npm run build --silent && node dist/cli.js init
scripts.manage: npm run build --silent && node dist/cli.js status
scripts.templates: npm run build --silent && node dist/cli.js templates
